---
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    css: ["default", "extra.css"]
    lib_dir: libs
    seal: false
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
      ratio: '16:9'
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE}
##xaringan::inf_mr()
## For offline work: https://bookdown.org/yihui/rmarkdown/some-tips.html#working-offline
## Images not appearing? Put images folder inside the libs folder as that is the main data directory

library(tidyverse)
##library(readxl)
##library(stargazer)
##library(kableExtra)
##library(modelr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      eval = TRUE,
                      error = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      comment = NA)
```

class: slideblue

.size80[**Today's Agenda**]

<br>

.size55[.center[
Writing Workshop
]]

<br>

<br>

.center[.size40[
  Justin Leinaweaver (Spring 2022)
]]

???

### Prep for Class
1. Prep email with evidence link for Monday
    - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1wKZRrm5JaZAAWbkC14iGfbs6syAMHnyZCEucqvco8Rg/edit?usp=sharing

<br>




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**For Monday**]

<br>

.size50[
Bring to class one specific piece of evidence you argue represents an act of terrorism. 

Make sure you are familiar with the actors and environment involved.
]

???

*Send class email*

Next week we kick off the third section of our class.

- What explains the variation in how and why non-state actors use violence against states and people?

- Specifically, we'll focus on terrorism.

<br>

We'll start with case studies and concept definitions next week.

- This means I need everyone to submit a real-world case to help us define terrorism on Monday.

- No overlap, first come, first served.

### Questions on the assignment?




---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**Paper 2 Prompt**]

<br>

.size50[Propose a specific strategy for reducing political violence by state governments. This can be focused at any level of action (e.g. individual, group, states, etc.).]

???

### Any questions on the assignment?



---

background-image: url('libs/Images/background-green_blue_swirl_side.jpg')
background-size: 100%
background-position: center
class: middle, center

.size60[**To be convincing an argument should be .textred[logical], .textred[clear], .textred[credible] and .textred[critical].**]



---

class: middle, slideblue

.size40[
1. .textred[**Logical**] arguments support their conclusion with well specified premises.

2. .textred[**Clear**] arguments are easy to read and understand.

3. .textred[**Credible**] arguments use high quality evidence and include proper citations.

4. .textred[**Critical**] arguments deepen our understanding of a topic by acknowledging the limitations of our logic / evidence and by addressing counter-arguments.
]
